mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT t.id AS id, t.id AS task_id, 'task' AS task_type, 0 AS is_shadow, NULL::BIGINT AS source_task_id, NULL::BIGINT AS source_project_id, NULL::VARCHAR AS source_task_name, NULL::VARCHAR AS source_project_name, NULL::VARCHAR AS source_description, NULL::VARCHAR AS shadow_alias, NULL::VARCHAR AS shadow_description, t.task_name, t.description, t.progress, t.status, t.priority, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.end_date AS due_date, t.assignee_id AS assignee, t.assignee_id AS owner_id, e.employee_name AS assignee_name, e.employee_name AS owner_name, t.project_id, p.project_name, t.is_pinned, t.is_focus, t.parent_id, t.task_code, NULL::VARCHAR AS task_module, t.attachments, t.stakeholders, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.update_time AS last_progress_update_time, t.create_by::VARCHAR AS created_by, ce.employee_name AS created_by_name, t.create_time AS created_at, t.update_time AS updated_at, 0 AS annotation_count, 0 AS task_type_order FROM pm_task t LEFT JOIN pm_project p ON t.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee e ON t.assignee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee ce ON t.create_by = ce.id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId}
UNION ALL
SELECT s.id AS id, NULL::BIGINT AS task_id, 'shadow' AS task_type, 1 AS is_shadow, s.source_task_id, st.project_id AS source_project_id, st.task_name AS source_task_name, sp.project_name AS source_project_name, st.description AS source_description, s.shadow_alias, s.shadow_description, COALESCE(s.shadow_alias, st.task_name) AS task_name, st.description AS description, st.progress, st.status, st.priority, st.start_date, st.end_date, st.end_date AS due_date, st.assignee_id AS assignee, st.assignee_id AS owner_id, e.employee_name AS assignee_name, e.employee_name AS owner_name, s.project_id, p.project_name, 0 AS is_pinned, 0 AS is_focus, s.parent_id, NULL::VARCHAR AS task_code, NULL::VARCHAR AS task_module, st.attachments AS attachments, st.stakeholders AS stakeholders, s.created_at AS create_time, s.updated_at AS update_time, s.updated_at AS last_progress_update_time, s.created_by, ce.employee_name AS created_by_name, s.created_at, s.updated_at, COUNT(a.id) AS annotation_count, 1 AS task_type_order FROM pm_task_shadow s INNER JOIN pm_task st ON s.source_task_id = st.id LEFT JOIN pm_project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pm_project sp ON st.project_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee e ON st.assignee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee ce ON s.created_by = ce.username LEFT JOIN pm_shadow_annotation a ON s.id = a.shadow_id WHERE s.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY s.id, st.id, p.id, sp.id, e.id, ce.id ) AS combined
ORDER BY task_type_order, is_pinned DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT s.id, NULL::BIGINT AS task_id, s.id AS id, 'shadow' AS task_type, 1 AS is_shadow, s.source_task_id, st.project_id AS source_project_id, st.task_name AS source_task_name, sp.project_name AS source_project_name, st.description AS source_description, s.shadow_alias, s.shadow_description, COALESCE(s.shadow_alias, st.task_name) AS task_name, st.description AS description, st.progress, st.status, st.priority, st.start_date, st.end_date, st.end_date AS due_date, st.assignee_id AS assignee, st.assignee_id AS owner_id, e.employee_name AS assignee_name, e.employee_name AS owner_name, s.project_id, p.project_name, 0 AS is_pinned, 0 AS is_focus, s.parent_id, NULL::VARCHAR AS task_code, NULL::VARCHAR AS task_module, st.attachments AS attachments, st.stakeholders AS stakeholders, s.created_at AS create_time, s.updated_at AS update_time, s.updated_at AS last_progress_update_time, s.created_by, ce.employee_name AS created_by_name, s.created_at, s.updated_at, COUNT(a.id) AS annotation_count FROM pm_task_shadow s INNER JOIN pm_task st ON s.source_task_id = st.id LEFT JOIN pm_project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pm_project sp ON st.project_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee e ON st.assignee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee ce ON s.created_by = ce.username LEFT JOIN pm_shadow_annotation a ON s.id = a.shadow_id WHERE s.id = #{shadowId} GROUP BY s.id, st.id, p.id, sp.id, e.id, ce.id

SELECT s.*, p.project_name AS target_project_name, st.task_name AS source_task_name, sp.project_name AS source_project_name, COUNT(a.id) AS annotation_count, st.progress AS source_progress, st.status AS source_status, st.priority AS source_priority, st.description AS source_description, st.start_date AS source_start_date, st.end_date AS source_end_date, e.employee_name AS source_owner_name, st.attachments AS source_attachments, ce.employee_name AS created_by_name FROM pm_task_shadow s INNER JOIN pm_task st ON s.source_task_id = st.id LEFT JOIN pm_project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pm_project sp ON st.project_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee e ON st.assignee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee ce ON s.created_by = ce.username LEFT JOIN pm_shadow_annotation a ON s.id = a.shadow_id WHERE s.source_task_id = #{sourceTaskId} GROUP BY s.id, p.id, st.id, sp.id, e.id, ce.id ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
